$comment: The model selects the relevant KB(s) and a focused per-KB query, grounded ONLY on the catalog summaries (cheap - no doc retrieval yet). Pick the few that fit; omit the rest. output_schema forces the shape the route_score oracle reads.

selections.description: only the KB(s) relevant to the task; omit the rest

kb.description: a KB name EXACTLY as in the catalog

query.description: a focused search query for that KB
